description_long: This doll features a whimsical design with large, pointed ears resembling those of a bat or a fantasy creature, adorned with orange tufts at the base. The head is covered by a deep purple hood speckled with white star-like dots, evoking a night sky theme. The doll wears a matching purple coat with a yellow scarf draped around the neck and hanging down the back, and yellow trim at the hem and cuffs. Its face is mostly obscured, with only a small portion of the lower face visible, and it holds a rectangular object, possibly a phone, in one hand. The legs are short and clad in brown, with black boots completing the outfit. The overall appearance is playful and imaginative, suitable for urban play environments or as a collectible figure.
description: A whimsical doll with large bat-like ears, a starry purple hooded coat, yellow scarf, and black boots, holding a rectangular object. The design is playful and night-sky themed.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's large purple ears, star-patterned hood, yellow scarf, and the rectangular object held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the ears, the scarf trailing down the back, and the rectangular object held forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hood, the full length of the yellow scarf, and the back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the ear profile, the scarf, and the rectangular object held in the left hand.
attribute_clothing_style: Fantasy-inspired outerwear with a deep purple, star-patterned hooded coat, yellow scarf, yellow-trimmed sleeves and hem, and black boots; the style evokes a whimsical, night-sky theme.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with head facing forward, right arm bent and holding a rectangular object, left arm relaxed at the side, legs straight and close together.
attribute_facial_expression: Face is mostly obscured by the hood and hair, with no visible mouth or eyes, giving a neutral or mysterious expression.
attribute_hair_style: Long black hair with two thick strands visible at the front, partially covered by the hood.
